topic: Grounding OathFish predictive swarm intelligence: superforecasting calibration, multi-agent debate for prediction, ensemble methods in collective intelligence, adversarial debiasing in group deliberation, agent-based social simulation for forecasting
context: OathFish is a two-layer prediction engine: deep deliberation (30 archetype agents reasoning across structured rounds) + mass amplification (1500 stateless batch calls). We need research grounding for: (1) persistent archetype calibration across runs, (2) adversarial debate structure for debiasing, (3) ensemble prediction combining qualitative depth + quantitative breadth, (4) what makes multi-agent predictions accurate, (5) cascade/network effect modeling in social dynamics
